_meta: Sprint D-10 F11 — EN copy for the in-app help center.
index.title: Help Center
index.subtitle: Short guides for getting the most out of the AI Co-Pilot Suite. Can't find an answer? Ask the chat: Cmd+J.
index.footer: These pages live inside the app and work offline.
chat.title: AI Co-Pilot Chat
chat.summary: Zyrix knows your data. Ask anything — get an answer in seconds.
chat.section.1.title: How do I open the chat?
chat.section.1.body: Click the spark icon in the bottom right, or use the Cmd+J / Ctrl+J shortcut. The chat is available on every page; past conversations are listed on the left.
chat.section.2.title: What can I ask?
chat.section.2.body: Anything about your business: 'What's MRR this month?', 'Which invoices are overdue?', 'Cash runway?', 'Growth vs last month?'. The AI runs scoped queries against your merchantId — you can never see another merchant's data.
chat.section.3.title: Voice input
chat.section.3.body: Tap the microphone icon and speak your question. TR / AR / EN are all supported. On mobile use the system keyboard's mic — accuracy is better.
chat.section.4.title: History and privacy
chat.section.4.body: Conversations are kept for 90 days by default. Profile > Chat settings lets you set 'forever'. No conversation is ever shared with another merchant.
insights.title: Insights
insights.summary: Critical, attention, and opportunity cards the AI surfaces from your data.
insights.section.1.title: What's an insight?
insights.section.1.body: Once a day the AI scans your data and surfaces critical findings (collections, customer concentration, tax burden, etc.) as cards on your dashboard.
insights.section.2.title: Three insight types
insights.section.2.body:
🔴 CRITICAL — needs action now.
🟠 ATTENTION — watch this week.
🟢 OPPORTUNITY — a chance for growth or efficiency.
insights.section.3.title: Acting on an insight
insights.section.3.body: Every insight has a CTA button. Mark resolved, dismiss, or share with your accountant or partner. Past insights are listed on the /insights/shares page.
notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.summary: Real-time alerts for insights and share events — pick your channels.
notifications.section.1.title: Available channels
notifications.section.1.body: In-app (bell), email, web push, mobile push (coming soon), and Slack (D-9). Pick a channel for each event type from /settings/notifications.
notifications.section.2.title: Quiet hours
notifications.section.2.body: Set quiet hours to silence notifications during specific times. Critical insights bypass this rule — if it really matters, we'll wake you up.
notifications.section.3.title: Mute everything
notifications.section.3.body: On vacation? Use 'mute until' to suspend all notifications until the date you pick. When the date passes, normal rules resume automatically.
reports.title: Weekly Reports
reports.summary: A detailed performance report generated for you every Sunday at 18:00.
reports.section.1.title: When does it arrive?
reports.section.1.body: Every Sunday at 18:00 (local time) it lands in your inbox and the /reports/weekly archive. Your first report arrives the first Sunday after signup.
reports.section.2.title: What's in it?
reports.section.2.body: 12-KPI summary, AI-narrated trend analysis, week-over-week change, market positioning vs peers, and recommended focus areas for the upcoming week.
reports.section.3.title: Disabling
reports.section.3.body: Turn off the weekly report from /settings/notifications. The 'unsubscribe' link at the bottom of every email also works — one click and you're out.
sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.summary: Send insights and reports to your accountant, partner, or team.
sharing.section.1.title: How do I share?
sharing.section.1.body: Every insight and report has a 'Share' button. Pick email, WhatsApp, or a public link (URL). Public links support password protection and expiry dates.
sharing.section.2.title: Frequent recipients
sharing.section.2.body: Add your accountant or partner once at /insights/recipients, then pick them on subsequent shares. Every share appears in the audit log — who, what, when.
sharing.section.3.title: Open and read tracking
sharing.section.3.body: Email shares show 'delivered' and 'opened' status on the /insights/shares page. WhatsApp shares don't expose this — Meta API limitation.
slack.title: Slack Integration
slack.summary: Critical insights flow straight into your team's Slack channels.
slack.section.1.title: How do I connect?
slack.section.1.body: Open /settings/integrations and click 'Connect Slack'. Slack's OAuth screen opens; pick a workspace and approve. You can connect multiple workspaces.
slack.section.2.title: Which insights go where?
slack.section.2.body: For each connected workspace map critical / attention / opportunity / share events to specific channels (e.g. critical → #alerts, opportunity → #growth). The Test Send button lets you verify before saving.
slack.section.3.title: Slash commands
slack.section.3.body: In Slack type `/zyrix mrr`, `/zyrix runway`, `/zyrix today` — KPIs respond directly in the channel. Only the merchant who connected the workspace can see their own data.
slack.section.4.title: Disconnecting
slack.section.4.body: Same page has a 'Disconnect' button. Slack-side token is revoked, channel mappings are cleared, the bot stops sending messages.
settings.title: Account Settings
settings.summary: Profile, security, language, privacy and data preferences.
settings.section.1.title: Two-factor authentication (2FA)
settings.section.1.body: Turn on 2FA from Profile > Security. Scan the QR code with a TOTP app (Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy) and save the recovery codes.
settings.section.2.title: Changing language
settings.section.2.body: Use the flag/language picker in the top right to switch between TR / EN / AR. All AI replies, insights, emails and reports follow the chosen language.
settings.section.3.title: Exporting your data
settings.section.3.body: From Profile > Data & Privacy you can request a JSON export of all your data. KVKK / GDPR compliant — we deliver within 30 days.
settings.section.4.title: Closing your account
settings.section.4.body: Email destek@zyrix.co to delete your account permanently. All data (insights, shares, chats, reports) is purged within 30 days.
